description: The NOC is modernizing its incident response workflow by integrating OpManager alerts directly into ChatOps, ITSM, and SMS paging systems via Webhooks. An API integration specification document has been placed on your desktop at ~/Desktop/webhook_api_specs.txt. Your task is to review this document and configure three new 'Invoke WebHook' notification profiles in OpManager exactly as specified: one for Slack, one for Jira, and one for Twilio. Navigate to Settings > Notifications > Notification Profiles to create them. OpManager is available at http://localhost:8060 with credentials admin / Admin@123.
